Configuration files for the nrf52 target in the NimBLE project, specifying dependencies and settings.


## Files
- **[pkg.yml](pkg.yml.md)**: Configuration file for the nrf52 target in the NimBLE project, specifying dependencies.
- **[syscfg.yml](syscfg.yml.md)**: Configuration settings for the NRF52 target in the NimBLE Bluetooth stack.
- **[target.yml](target.yml.md)**: Configuration settings for the nrf52 target, including app, BSP, and build profile.
